steps.title: Translate the relationships
steps.content:
The first relationship gives:
$$0.42h=0.54j$$The second gives:
$$j=0.28k$$

steps.title: Write h in terms of k
steps.content:
Solve the first equation for $h$, then substitute $j=0.28k$:
$$h=\frac{0.54}{0.42}j$$
$$h=\frac{0.54}{0.42}(0.28k)$$
$$h=0.36k$$

steps.title: Convert to a percent
steps.content: Since $h=0.36k$, $h$ is $36\%$ of $k$. The answer is 36.
